services.title: Our Full Capabilities
services.subtitle: Distilled from 148 solution templates into 6 core categories — the complete range of solutions our agency delivers.

featured.title: Featured Solutions
featured.subtitle: A closer look at our three most-requested areas of expertise.

item1.title: We Build Your SaaS Product from Scratch
item1.desc: Complete SaaS setup from idea to production. Multi-tenant architecture, subscription management, admin panel, onboarding flow, and CI/CD pipeline included. Average 6-8 weeks to launch.

item2.title: Autonomous AI Agent Systems
item2.desc: Autonomous AI agents equipped with tool-calling, RAG, and multi-step task execution. Self-running systems for research, code writing, CRM updates, and customer responses.

item3.title: Complete Architecture for Your Sector
item3.desc: KVKK/GDPR-compliant, full-stack systems for dental clinics, law firms, restaurants, real estate, salons, and more. Customized for each sector's workflows, regulations, and integration needs.

howItWorks.title: How We Work
howItWorks.subtitle: From idea to product in three steps, with a predictable process.

step1.title: Discovery
step1.desc: In a free strategy session, we analyze your needs and create your technical roadmap and timeline.

step2.title: Build
step2.desc: We customize and build from our 148+ solution templates. You track progress with weekly demos.

step3.title: Deploy & Scale
step3.desc: We go live, monitor, and iterate. 30 days of free post-delivery support included.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Clear packages for businesses of every size. No hidden fees.

pilot.name: Discovery
pilot.desc: No reason not to take the first step — we start with a free consultation.

growth.name: Growth
growth.desc: Ideal for projects with 1-3 modules. 2-6 week delivery.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: Bundle pricing for large-scale and multi-module projects.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions on your mind.

items.a: We serve 15+ sectors: healthcare, dental, legal, real estate, restaurant, e-commerce, fintech, education, logistics, beauty and more. If your sector isn't on the list, reach out — we can build solutions for nearly any industry.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: It depends on scope: single-module solutions in 1-2 weeks, 3-5 module projects in 4-8 weeks, full platform setups in 8-16 weeks. We give you a concrete timeline estimate in the first session.

items.q: Can you integrate with our existing systems?
items.a: Yes. We offer 20+ integration support via API, webhook, n8n, and Zapier. Your existing CRM, ERP, accounting software, or any tool — we can connect.

items.q: How do you ensure data security?
items.a: All projects are configured to be KVKK and GDPR compliant. Your data is never shared with any third party. Supabase RLS, JWT authentication, and encrypted data storage are applied as standard.
Yes — all packages include 30 days of free support and bug fixes. Monthly maintenance subscription plans are also available for long-term support.

items.q: Will we receive the source code?
items.a: Yes, full source code is delivered. Everything developed belongs to you. We also deliver documentation and an admin panel.

items.q: Does our team need technical knowledge?
items.a: No. Solutions we deliver come with an admin panel that your team can easily use. No technical knowledge required.

items.q: Can we order multiple modules at once?
items.a: Yes, and we apply a bundle discount in that case. Click 'Get a Quote' and reach out to us for 3+ module package pricing.
